content: Hey, I'm getting married next year and I want to learn some new skills to impress my fiancée. I'm a Product Designer at a fintech startup, so I don't have a lot of free time.
Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! That's exciting. What kind of skills are you thinking of learning?
I've always wanted to learn how to paint, so I've been taking some classes on the weekends. I've also been getting into hiking and trying to go on at least one hike per month.
Painting and hiking are great hobbies! What inspired you to start painting?
I've just always been fascinated by art and I love the idea of creating something from scratch. My fiancée is actually an artist, so I'm hoping to create a piece for our wedding.
That's so romantic! Creating a piece for your wedding will make it even more special. What's your fiancée's style like?
She loves vintage cars and gardening, so I'm thinking of incorporating those themes into the piece. We're actually planning a garden-themed wedding for June 2025.
That sounds beautiful! A garden-themed wedding will be perfect for incorporating your fiancée's loves. Have you thought about the venue yet?
We're actually thinking about having it at my family's old mansion in the countryside. It has a huge garden that will be perfect for the theme.
That sounds stunning! Using your family's old mansion will add a lot of character to the wedding. What's the plan for the decorations and layout?
We're thinking about having a mix of vintage and modern decorations, with a lot of greenery and flowers. We're also planning to have a tennis court set up for our guests to play on.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Having a tennis court will be a great way to keep your guests entertained. What's the plan for the food and drinks?
We're thinking about having a lot of outdoor food stations, with things like BBQ and seafood. We're also planning to have a signature cocktail for the wedding.
That sounds delicious! Having outdoor food stations will be perfect for a garden-themed wedding. What's the plan for the music and entertainment?
We're thinking about having a live band play during the reception, and also having a photo booth set up for our guests to take pictures in.
That sounds like a great plan! Having a live band and photo booth will be a lot of fun for your guests. What's the plan for the wedding cake?
We're thinking about having a multi-tiered cake with a garden theme, with lots of flowers and greenery. We're also planning to have a cake-tasting event a few weeks before the wedding.
That sounds amazing! Having a multi-tiered cake with a garden theme will be perfect for your wedding. I'm sure your fiancée will love it.
Thanks, I hope so! I'm just trying to make everything perfect for her. I've also been working on home automation for our new house, so that's been taking up a lot of my time.
Home automation can be a big project, but it'll be worth it in the end. What kind of features are you planning to include?
